entities.name: BUNDELKHAND REGION
entities.description: A region in Uttar Pradesh characterized by water scarcity and drought

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state where the Bundelkhand region is located

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources affecting the Bundelkhand region

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall in the Bundelkhand region

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, UP GOVERNMENT
entities.description: The government body that partnered with ICRISAT for land restoration

entities.name: ICRISAT HYDERABAD
entities.description: The international research center that partnered with the UP government for land restoration

entities.name: LAND RESTORATION
entities.description: The process of recovering degraded land to make it productive again

entities.name: HOLISTIC DEVELOPMENT INITIATIVE
entities.description: A comprehensive program for rural development and land restoration across 40 villages

entities.name: JHANSI DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Uttar Pradesh where the restoration project was implemented

entities.name: RAINWATER HARVESTING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Methods used to capture and store monsoon rains to recharge groundwater

entities.name: RENOVATING HAVELIS
entities.description: A traditional rainwater harvesting technique used in the project

entities.name: CONSTRUCTING CHECK DAMS
entities.description: A modern rainwater harvesting technique used to capture water

entities.name: WIDENING NATURAL DRAINS
entities.description: A technique used to improve water flow and capture for groundwater recharge

entities.name: MONSOON RAINS
entities.description: Seasonal rainfall captured to recharge the depleted groundwater table

entities.name: GROUNDWATER TABLE
entities.description: The underground level of water saturation that was recharged by the project

entities.name: SEMI-ARID ZONE
entities.description: The climatic zone of the region that was transformed into a productive agricultural hub

entities.name: FALLOW LAND
entities.description: Previously uncultivated land brought back into production

entities.name: FARMERS' INCOMES
entities.description: The financial earnings of rural farmers which doubled due to the intervention

entities.name: DISTRESS MIGRATION
entities.description: The forced movement of people due to lack of resources, which was curbed by the project

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: An environment fostered through agroforestry and livestock programs

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: The integration of trees and shrubs into crop and animal farming systems

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PROGRAMS
entities.description: Initiatives to improve animal husbandry as part of the sustainable ecosystem

entities.name: FARMER PRODUCER ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Groups formed by farmers to improve market access and prosperity
